rows.label: qev060501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome!
Various trash produced in NLA!
And the occasional hazardous material![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0002
rows.name:
This lovely facility that processes absolutely all of it
is the waste processing tank![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0003
rows.name:
I am the head of the waste processing department
at this plant, Liza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0083
rows.name:
Do you have something you want processed?
I'll burn anything up with ultra-high heat♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Answer that you have various
unnecessary things.

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0021
rows.name: Answer that you don't have anything in particular.

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, I figured.
Many BLADEs are sloppy people like you, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh, so you're a highly capable, cool person who
can keep things organized and tidy!
I like people like that♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Other BLADEs just hoard nothing but
unnecessary junk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0007
rows.name:
The moment this place became operational, they started
bringing in all sorts of incomprehensible things one after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I really have to wonder where they were hoarding
such massive amounts of sketchy garbage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Thanks to that, we're suddenly short-staffed.
It feels like we won't be able to catch up unless
we hire people from any planet at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Ah! That's right!
By the looks of it, you have a face that suggests you've been well-versed in alien matters since birth, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0011
rows.name:
If you don't mind, could you tell me which aliens
might be suited for working in the waste processing department?
Come on, please? Pretty please♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0030
rows.name: Ma-non

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0031
rows.name: Answer that the Ma-non would be suitable.

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0040
rows.name: Nopon[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0041
rows.name: Answer that the Nopon would be suitable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0050
rows.name: Zaruboggan

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0051
rows.name: Answer that the Zaruboggan would be suitable.

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ah, those little guys!
Well, they certainly seem good with machines,
so they might actually be a good fit♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0013
rows.name:
Can those round things really handle our heavy labor?
But wait... they might have some incredible hidden powers like mysterious psychic abilities or something![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0014
rows.name:
Eh... those suspicious masked people?
They seem shrouded in mystery to an extreme degree,
but is that really going to be okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hmm...
...But thinking about it myself is a hassle...
So I'll trust you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then I'll head over to their place right away
and look for someone willing to work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Shuh! Shuneeen!!
Too much garbage kept coming around, and it got
so confusing that I was just wandering around, and then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Waste processing tank got angry
and spat out smoke, zo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Wh-What should I do!?
It looks like it's going to be really bad if we leave it like that, zo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Hey, it's overheating!
Wh-wh-why did you leave it alone
until it got like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0021
rows.name:
I didn't leave it alone, zo.
I hit the machine and forcefully
pushed the jammed garbage in, zo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Guh! This is what you call a hiring mistake!
But this too is the doing of me, the department head![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I get it! I'll go look for additional personnel immediately.
In the meantime, you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Go use the Frontier Net around here and bring back
3 Millennium Ice Ores to cool down the overheated
waste processing tank♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0085
rows.name:
Ah... if that seems hard to find,
you can bring me about 10 Jakitos Coppers instead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0025
rows.name:
You'll do it, right...?
Because if we leave it like that, pollutants will flow into the city
and it will turn into a massive disaster...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Thank you!
Please hurry and bring them if possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0027
rows.name:
There's a diner around here, and if that gets
contaminated too, I'll definitely... get scolded so hard...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0059
rows.name: This is bad... This might be about the third biggest crisis in my entire history...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0060
rows.name:
...Ah! Did you manage to get 3 Millennium Ice Ores
or 10 Jakitos Coppers?
If we at least have those...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0061
rows.name:
Ohh... it's super cold...
With this, we can cool down the scorching processing tank.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0062
rows.name:
Thank you...
But things on this end were a total bust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0063
rows.name:
I brought a new employee, but they said
they hate such a dangerous workplace
and went home immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0064
rows.name:
I need manpower just to clean up the
dangerous-looking stuff leaking around here...
Jeez... what am I going to do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0080
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0081
rows.name: Cheer Liza on.

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0090
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0091
rows.name: Sternly scold Liza.

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0065
rows.name:
That's it, that's it, praise me, praise me, encourage me!
I'm the type who grows from praise![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0066
rows.name:
No... if you get mad at me at a time like this,
I feel like I'll just abandon everything...
Ugh, please forgive weak little me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0067
rows.name:
...Hey, hey, Liza!
Don't play around, do something about this!
At this rate, it's going to spread throughout all of NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0068
rows.name:
In the first place, why did you leave the operation
of a delicate processing tank to a Bias who just relies on brute force?
I told you to leave it to someone who knows machines, didn't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0069
rows.name:
Aah! Technical Advisor Dazbeno!
Please don't blame me so much right now...!
My already diminished thinking power is about to hit zero...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0070
rows.name:
We thought we smelled the fragrant scent of Voltant,
so we came to investigate... What a magnificent sight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0071
rows.name:
Trachlo Rishiron...
I-I wish to revoltant immediately.
May I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0072
rows.name:
I can... endure it no longer!
Ahhh, aaaaaaaaaaahhhh!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0073
rows.name:
What's with these weird people at a time like this...
I-I'm scared...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0074
rows.name:
...Wait! Eeeeeh!!
Why did the contamination levels
suddenly drop to zero!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0075
rows.name: ...Phew, I am satisfied.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0076
rows.name:
I do not know why Voltant was welling up in a place like this,
but could this too be a gift from Golbogga?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0077
rows.name:
It must surely be.
We must thank Golbogga...
...Now then, let us go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0078
rows.name:
...Hey... could it be that those people
did what just happened?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0100
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0101
rows.name: Nod, saying it must definitely be the case.

rows.label: qev060501_JNK0110
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060501_SEL0111
rows.name: Shake your head, saying you don't think so.

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0079
rows.name:
Th-Then I absolutely have to scout them
for the waste processing department!
If they can use magic like that, it's super convenient![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0080
rows.name:
...But there might be another cause...
Anyway, I have to at least try talking to them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0081
rows.name:
They will surely become the saviors of this
waste processing department![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0035
rows.name:
While you go get the 3 Millennium Ice Ores
or the 10 Jakitos Coppers,
I will go look for employees![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0036
rows.name:
I think it was the Ma-non, right!
Maybe those little guys can repair this breakdown too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0037
rows.name:
While you go get the 3 Millennium Ice Ores
or the 10 Jakitos Coppers,
I will go look for employees![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060501_MSG0038
rows.name:
I think it was the Nopon, right!
I'll go scout them, hoping that an incredible power
lies dormant deep within their small bodies![ST:wait ]
